title: At the Clothing Store
scene: 你在商场里想买一件新衬衫。

turns.en: Hi! Can I help you?
Yes, I'm looking for a dress shirt.
What size do you wear?
Medium. Do you have it in blue?
Yes, we do. The fitting room is over there.
This fits perfectly. How much is it?
It's forty-nine ninety, tax included.
Great, I'll take it.

title: Returning an Item
scene: 你买了一条裤子，尺码不对，去柜台退货。

turns.en: Hi, I'd like to return these pants.
Is there a problem with them?
They're too small. I have the receipt.
Sure, I can process a refund for you.

turns.cn: 您是用卡还是现金付的？
turns.en: Did you pay with a card or cash?
I paid with a credit card.

turns.cn: 退款三到五个工作日到账。
turns.en: The refund will go back to your card in three to five business days.
Okay, thank you.

title: At the Supermarket
scene: 你在超市找东西，向店员问路。

turns.en: Excuse me, where can I find the milk?

turns.cn: 乳制品区在后面，左边第三个过道。
turns.en: The dairy section is in the back, third aisle on the left.

turns.cn: 谢谢！顺便问一下，今天鸡蛋有折扣吗？
turns.en: Thanks! By the way, are the eggs on sale today?

turns.cn: 有的，本周特价两美元一打。
turns.en: Yes, they're two dollars a dozen this week.
Great, I'll grab a carton.
Is there anything else I can help you with?
No, that's all. Thanks for your help!

turns.cn: 欢迎光临！需要什么帮助？
turns.en: Welcome! How can I help you?

turns.cn: 我想买一双跑步鞋，十码。
turns.en: I'm looking for a pair of running shoes, size ten.

turns.cn: 这款很受欢迎，您要试穿吗？
turns.en: This model is very popular. Would you like to try them on?
Sure. These feel a bit tight.

turns.cn: 我给您拿大半码的试试。
turns.en: Let me get you a half size larger.

turns.cn: 这双舒服多了，就这双吧。
turns.en: These are much better. I'll take these.
Great. I'll ring them up for you.

title: Black Friday Sale
scene: 黑色星期五，你在商场抢购打折商品。

turns.en: How much is this jacket on sale for?

turns.cn: 原价一百二，现在四十 off，七十二块。
turns.en: It was one twenty, now forty percent off, so seventy-two.

turns.cn: 太划算了！有大一号的吗？
turns.en: That's a great deal! Do you have a large?
Let me check in the back. One moment, please.
Yes, this is the last one we have.

turns.cn: 那我马上买，别被别人抢走了。
turns.en: I'll take it right now before someone else grabs it.

turns.cn: 明智之选！请到这边结账。
turns.en: Smart choice! Checkout is right over here.

title: Exchange Size
scene: 你买的裤子尺码不对，去柜台换货。

turns.cn: 你好，这条裤子太小了，能换大一号吗？
turns.en: Hi, these pants are too small. Can I exchange them for a larger size?
May I see the receipt and the tags?
The tags are still on. I bought them yesterday.

turns.cn: 三十二码还有货，我去拿。
turns.en: We still have size thirty-two in stock. I'll grab a pair.
Do I need to pay any price difference?
No, it's the same style and price.
Thanks. Where's the fitting room?
